Here is a complete breakdown:

---

## `Button` Definition

**File:** `src/components/ui/button/button.tsx`

`Button` is defined as a **`React.forwardRef` functional component** that wraps either a native `<button>` or a Radix UI `<Slot>` (when `asChild` is `true`). It uses `class-variance-authority` (CVA) to manage style variants.

### Props (`ButtonProps`)
| Prop | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `variant` | `'default' \| 'destructive' \| 'outline' \| 'secondary' \| 'ghost' \| 'link'` | Visual style variant |
| `size` | `'default' \| 'sm' \| 'lg' \| 'icon'` | Size variant |
| `asChild` | `boolean` | Renders as a Radix `<Slot>` instead of `<button>` |
| `isLoading` | `boolean` | Shows a `<Spinner>` in place of the icon |
| `icon` | `React.ReactNode` | Optional icon rendered before children |
| `...props` | `React.ButtonHTMLAttributes<HTMLButtonElement>` | All standard button HTML attributes |

---

## Files Where `<Button>` Is Rendered

### 🔵 Application Routes
| File | Usage |
|---|---|
| `src/app/routes/landing.tsx` | Rendered twice (lines 33, 61) |

| File | Usage |
|---|---|
| `src/components/layouts/dashboard-layout.tsx` | Rendered twice (icon button for mobile, logout button) |
| `src/components/errors/main.tsx` | Rendered once (error recovery action) |
